message:
feat(tui,bench,search): screen transitions, native benchmarks, metrics

tui_app: Major TUI enhancement with 571-line diff adding:
- ScreenTransition struct for smooth 4-tick animated screen changes
- Screen transition progress calculation for crossfade effects
- ThemeId integration with last_non_hc_theme tracking for high-contrast
  toggle preservation
- appearance_persist_path for theme persistence across sessions
- Removed redundant active_next/active_prev methods in favor of direct
  set_active_screen calls
- Extended MailAppModel initialization with theme detection

tui_chrome: 13-line adjustments for transition integration.

tui_persist: Added 34 lines for appearance/theme persistence.

bench: Massive 528-line expansion introducing native benchmark fixtures:
- BENCH_PROJECT_HUMAN_KEY, BENCH_PROJECT_SLUG constants
- BENCH_AGENT_BLUE/RED for deterministic fixture agents
- BENCH_SEED_*_MESSAGES constants (50 forward + 10 reply = 60 total)
- BenchSeedError enum with thiserror derivation
- Native SqliteConnection-based fixture seeding bypassing CLI overhead
- Instant-based timing for microsecond-precision measurements
- Refactored CMD_* command arrays to use constants

ci: Extended CI infrastructure with 62 lines for benchmark integration.

lib (cli): 100+ lines of benchmark command registration and routing.

mode_matrix_harness: 10 lines of test matrix expansion.

search_service: 30-line diff improving search query routing.

two_tier (search-core): 439-line expansion of TwoTierBridge with:
- Enhanced search result ranking
- Improved cache invalidation
- Thread-safety hardening from recent tests

lib (server): 93 lines of server startup improvements.

startup_checks: 65 lines of initialization validation.

storage/lib: 93 lines of storage layer improvements.

messaging (tools): 98 lines of messaging tool enhancements.

metrics (tools): 161 lines of new metrics collection tools.

search (tools): 149 lines of search tool improvements.

main: 20 lines of entry point adjustments.

Note: --graph-root.svg and .beads/.br_history/ excluded as ephemeral.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
